source_pr.title: *: Provide `TemporaryTableSnapshotInterceptor` to read temporary table data
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28035

Related to #27936 , in the previous pr we provide interfae `SnapshotInterceptor` to interceptor snapshot read operations. This pr provides a implement for `SnapshotInterceptor` to read temporary table data.

### What is changed and how it works?

Provide `TemporaryTableSnapshotInterceptor` to read temporary table data

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: if !sort.SliceIsSorted(data, lessFunc) { (table/temptable/main_test.go).
